title: Section 5
content: (1) The Chairperson may resign his office by writing under his hand addressed to the Central Government: Provided that the Chairperson shall continue in office 1[until the appointment of his successor is made by the Central Government]. (2) A Member may resign from office by writing under his hand addressed to the Chairperson.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3 ibid, for the words "until the appointment of his successor is made by the Central Government" (w.e.f 29.12.2018)
